title: Networked Chests
body:
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/supports-1.20.1-green)
# What does this mod add?
* An item to access chests from anywhere. Just (shift) right-click a chest and the item is linked to it. You can now access the chest from anywhere by right clicking with the item
# How do you get the item?
![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rwAbJVl5/images/60d3eb87d515ead26d42a6f3f3bd2c23e95280c7.png)

# Feedback wanted!
Please report any bugs you find in my Discord. If you have ideas how I could improve this mod, or new content I should add, that feedback is also welcome.
